problem_text_cn: 1429 卢瑟福弹性散射：入射$^4_2\text{He}$（动能2 MeV）轰击静止$^1_1\text{H}$。(1) 实验室系中$\varphi_L = 30^\circ$方向反冲氢核动能多大？(2) 该方向的卢瑟福微分散射截面多大？质心系微分散截面$\sigma_C(\theta_C) = \left(\frac{a}{4}\right)^2\frac{1}{\sin^4(\theta_C/2)}$，$a = \frac{z_1z_2e^2}{4\pi\varepsilon_0E_C}$，$E_C$为质心系能量。
problem_text_en: 1429 Rutherford elastic scattering: incident $^4_2\text{He}$ (KE 2 MeV) bombards stationary $^1_1\text{H}$. (1) What is the recoil KE of $^1_1\text{H}$ at $\varphi_L = 30^\circ$ in lab frame? (2) What is the Rutherford differential cross-section at this angle? CM frame cross-section $\sigma_C(\theta_C) = \left(\frac{a}{4}\right)^2\frac{1}{\sin^4(\theta_C/2)}$, $a = \frac{z_1z_2e^2}{4\pi\varepsilon_0E_C}$, $E_C$ is CM energy.
problem_solution_cn: 【核心思路】(1) 弹性散射中，反冲氢核速度$v_2' = 2v_C\cos\varphi_L$，$v_C = \frac{M_1}{M_1+M_2}v_1$，动能$E_\text{反冲} = \frac{4M_1M_2}{(M_1+M_2)^2}E_\text{入射}\cos^2\varphi_L$；(2) 质心系$\theta_C = \pi - \varphi_C = \pi - 2\varphi_L$，微分散截面$\sigma_L(\varphi_L) = 4\cos\varphi_L \cdot \sigma_C(\varphi_C)$，代入$a = 7.2 \times 10^{-15}\ \mathrm{m}$得$\sigma_L = 0.20\ \mathrm{b/sr}$。
problem_solution_en: 【Core Idea】(1) In elastic scattering, recoil $^1\text{H}$ speed $v_2' = 2v_C\cos\varphi_L$, $v_C = \frac{M_1}{M_1+M_2}v_1$, KE $E_\text{recoil} = \frac{4M_1M_2}{(M_1+M_2)^2}E_\text{incident}\cos^2\varphi_L$; (2) CM frame $\theta_C = \pi - \varphi_C = \pi - 2\varphi_L$, differential cross-section $\sigma_L(\varphi_L) = 4\cos\varphi_L \cdot \sigma_C(\varphi_C)$, substitute $a = 7.2 \times 10^{-15}\ \mathrm{m}$ to get $\sigma_L = 0.20\ \mathrm{b/sr}$.
problem_answer: (1) 反冲氢核动能$\boldsymbol{0.96\ \mathrm{MeV}}$；(2) 微分散射截面$\boldsymbol{0.20\ \mathrm{b/sr}}$（$1\ \mathrm{b} = 10^{-28}\ \mathrm{m^2}$）。
